hero.title: What Our Customers Say
hero.subtitle: Over 1,000 happy customers across Ireland — here's what they have to say about working with Green-House Renewables.

reviews.name: Miriam Murphy
reviews.text: Professional service from beginning to end. Green-House Renewables handled everything — from the SEAI grant paperwork to the installation itself. The team were courteous, tidy, and completed the job on time. Our electricity bills have dropped significantly since the system was installed.

reviews.name: Enda Collins
reviews.text: I couldn't recommend Green-House highly enough. From the initial consultation through to the completed installation, every step was handled professionally. The system is performing brilliantly and we're already seeing great savings on our energy bills.

reviews.name: Carol Dalton
reviews.text: The Green-House team were amazing from start to finish. They explained everything clearly, handled all the grant paperwork, and the installation was completed in just one day. Couldn't be happier with the results.

reviews.name: Patrick J Cusack
reviews.text: We can only speak in the highest possible terms about Green-House Renewables. The quality of workmanship, the professionalism of the team, and the aftercare have been exceptional. A first-class company.

reviews.name: Derek Boyle
reviews.text: Installed a 6.3 kWh system on my house. The team were professional, efficient, and left the place spotless. The system is generating more than expected and I'm delighted with the savings.

reviews.name: Tom Farrell
reviews.text: One of the best contractors I've dealt with. Green-House handled everything from start to finish — grant application, design, installation, and follow-up. Top-notch service all round.

reviews.name: Tom Johnson
reviews.text: Everyone at Green-House was fantastic. From the office staff to the installation team, they were all knowledgeable, friendly, and professional. The system is working brilliantly and we're very happy.

reviews.name: Eugene Hughes
reviews.text: Green-House team did a really excellent job on our solar installation. Very professional from start to finish. They handled the SEAI grant, designed the system perfectly for our roof, and the installation was clean and efficient.

reviews.name: D Judge
reviews.text: Team Green-House deserve 10 stars. Brilliant company to deal with. Everything was explained clearly, the installation was completed on time, and the system is performing exactly as promised. Highly recommended.

cta.title: Join Our Happy Customers
cta.subtitle: Get a free quote and see why homeowners and businesses across Ireland trust Green-House Renewables.
